data.title: Here's How Mainland China May Allow Chinese Traders Access to Bitcoin
data.description:
• There might be a day when Beijing allows Hong Kong's crypto ETFs to be traded in the Qualified Domestic Institutional Investor (QDII) program, which allows Chinese to buy and sell foreign stocks.
  • This program would allow mainland Chinese investors to get crypto exposure without owning the underlying asset.

data.title: Coinbase, NEAR, Others Form Alliance to Develop Open AI Services
data.description:
• A group of big-name crypto and blockchain entities have joined forces to deliver open AI services using combined infrastructure.
  • The aim of the alliance is to "ensure secure, open source, economical, and fair AI access."

data.title: BlackRock Adds Its IBIT Bitcoin ETF To Alternative Asset Model Portfolio
data.description:
• BlackRock has added a 1% to 2% allocation of the iShares Bitcoin Trust (IBIT) to its model portfolio that allows for alternative assets.
  • This marks the first time BlackRock has included IBIT in any of its models, a move that could signal broader institutional adoption of bitcoin.
  • BlackRock’s model portfolios manage around $130 billion, and while this is a smaller allocation, it could influence advisors and platforms that follow these models.

data.title: Bitcoin Dip-Buyers Step in Friday, but What Might Weekend Action Bring?
data.description:
• Bitcoin bounced during U.S. hours Friday as the Crypto Fear & Greed Index overnight hit levels not seen since the depths of the 2022 bear market.
  • Weekends have not been kind to crypto prices for a long string of weeks.
  • The bad news this time around, however, might be more than priced in.

data.title: Bitdeer Buys the Bitcoin Dip With BTC Price Set for Worst Month in Three Years
data.description:
• Bitdeer said it bought 50 BTC at an average price of $81,475
  • The company added to its bitcoin treasury as the price of the largest cryptocurrency is on track for its worst month since June 2022.
  • Bitdeer shares fell 0.64% at the start of trading on Friday.

data.title: CME Group to Launch Solana Futures as Demand for Crypto Derivatives Grows
data.description:
• Solana (SOL) futures will launch on March 17, pending regulatory approval.
  • Contracts will be cash-settled and based on CME CF Solana-Dollar Reference Rate.
  • SOL futures join CME's crypto product suite, which includes bitcoin and ether derivatives

data.title: Boerse Stuttgart  Partners With DekaBank to Offer Crypto Trading for Institutional Clients
data.description:
• DekaBank will provide crypto trading services to institutional clients through Boerse Stuttgart Digital
  • The partnership leverages Boerse Stuttgart Digital’s fully regulated crypto brokerage and is part of the exchange’s plan to form new partnerships.
  • Cryptocurrency trading accounts for 25% of Boerse Stuttgart’s revenues.

data.title: Borrowed Cash Fuels Bitcoin Purchases on Bitfinex as BTC Price Tumbles
data.description:
• Bitfinex bitcoin margin longs have grown to over 60,000 BTC while the BTC price has dropped to below $80,000.
  • The position has increased by over 13,000 BTC since the start of the year.

data.title: Bitcoin Set for Worst Month Since June 2022, Worst Week Since November That Year
data.description:
• Bitcoin is down 22% in February, and just under 18% this week.
  • Both measures are the BTC's worst since 2022.
  • The average purchase price of bitcoin this year is about $97,880, with investors facing an unrealized loss of more than 18%.

data.title: Bitcoin Sell-Off Could Be a Textbook 'Breakout and Retest' Play: Godbole
data.description:
• BTC price slide looks to be a classic breakout and retest setup thats know to bring bigger rallies.
  • A similar pattern played out in BTC in mid-2020 and in the Japanese 10-year bond yields.
